name: Ooga Booga: Troubles in Time
short_description: Defeat enemies and save your world from the clutches of evil!
detailed_description:
A long time ago, in the wilderness, Lucy, a being banished from another world, arrived on Earth to make it her home. The Earth was inhabited by the native fauna and the occasional visitor, which would not be a problem, until humans appeared and among them, the chosen one. Lucy, eager to dominate them all, used all the Machiavellian methods at her disposal, but humans are a tough nut to crack and will not let themselves be dominated so easily.



Get ready for an exciting adventure in "Ooga Booga: Troubles in Time"! Choose your character and travel through different universes to defeat the forces of evil, the enemy is waiting to beat you up!

BEWARE, the enemy wants to trick you, don't fall into his traps. Prove that you are the chosen one!

Features

■ Jump over obstacles to pass the level.
■ Fight against a multitude of enemies in different scenarios.
■ Use the Power ups to increase your abilities.
■ Escape from the rolling stone down the hill.
■ Ride the pig and dodge the thugs.
■ Talk to the characters to defeat the final boss.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal
